title: Woman of the North Country
writer: Charles Marquis Warren, Prescott Chaplin, Norman Reilly Raine
actors: Rod Cameron, Ruth Hussey, John Agar
plot: In 1890 Minnesota Christine Powell is the scheming head of the Powell dynasty, the richest mining empire of the era. But the Powell mine deposits are diminishing. The Mesabi range represents a whole new productive area but the rig...
